ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., JUSTDIAL.NS) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price record */,
  "source_api" TEXT /* Source API from which the data was obtained */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prices are denominated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., JUSTDIAL.NS) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded (e.g., NSE) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's Initial Public Offering (IPO) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_symbols_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NSE) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of trading hours */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address information of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., trend analysis, predictive modeling) */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_returns" (
  "log_return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log return record */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the log return record */,
  "log_return" REAL /* Log return value */,
  "source_api" TEXT /* Source API from which the data was obtained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log return record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log return record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_returns_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol")
)
